query:
SELECT 
  pc.*,
  p.name as partnerName,
  p.isActive as partnerIsActive,
  c.name as cityName
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.name = '重庆'
ORDER BY pc.id DESC;
